headline: How The CI&T (CINT) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analyst Views Turn More Mixed
summary: The average Street price target for CI&T has been cut to US$6 from US$7, even as one internal modelled fair value anchor remains unchanged at US$7.24. This shift lines up with mixed analyst commentary, where some firms stay constructive while others flag what they see as a tougher near term setup and less favorable risk or reward. As you read on, you will see how these updates fit together and what to watch as the CI&T story continues to evolve. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the...
